# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

<div class="comments-section mt-8">
    <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-4">Comments</h3>

    @forelse ($post->comments as $comment)
        <div class="comment-item bg-white shadow-md rounded-lg p-6 mb-6 border border-gray-200">
            <div class="comment-header flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
                <div class="flex items-center">
                    @if ($comment->user->profile_picture)
                        <img src="{{ asset('storage/' . $comment->user->profile_picture) }}" alt="{{ $comment->user->name }}" class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full mr-3 object-cover">
                    @else
                        <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full mr-3 bg-gray-300 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-600 font-semibold text-lg">
                            {{ substr($comment->user->name, 0, 1) }}
                        </div>
                    @endif
                    <span class="font-semibold text-lg text-gray-800">{{ $comment->user->name }}</span>
                </div>
                <span class="text-sm text-gray-500">{{ $comment->created_at->format('M d, Y H:i') }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="comment-content text-gray-700 leading-relaxed prose max-w-none">
                {!! $comment->content !!}
            </div>

            @auth
                @if (Auth::id() == $comment->user_id || Auth::user()->hasRole('admin'))
                    <div class="comment-actions mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-gray-100 flex gap-2">
                        <a href="{{ route('comments.edit', $comment) }}" class="text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800 text-sm">Edit</a>
                        <form action="{{ route('comments.destroy', $comment) }}" method="POST" onsubmit="return confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this comment?');">
                            @csrf
                            @method('DELETE')
                            <button type="submit" class="text-red-600 hover:text-red-800 text-sm ml-2">Delete</button>
                        </form>
                    </div>
                @endif
            @endauth
        </div>
    @empty
        <p class="text-gray-600 italic">No comments yet. Be the first to comment!</p>
    @endforelse

    @auth
        <div class="new-comment-form mt-8 bg-white shadow-md rounded-lg p-6 border border-gray-200">
            <h4 class="text-xl font-bold mb-4">Leave a Comment</h4>
            <form action="{{ route('posts.comments.store', $post) }}" method="POST">
                @csrf
                <div class="mb-4">
                    <label for="comment_content" class="sr-only">Your Comment</label>
                    <textarea id="comment_content" name="content" rows="6" class="form-textarea mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 shadow-sm focus:border-indigo-300 focus:ring focus:ring-indigo-200 focus:ring-opacity-50" placeholder="Type your comment here. You can use HTML like <b>bold</b>, <i>italic</i>, and <a href='link'>links</a>." required>{{ old('content') }}</textarea>
                    @error('content')
                        <p class="text-red-500 text-sm mt-1">{{ $message }}</p>
                    @enderror
                </div>
                <button type="submit" class="px-6 py-3 bg-indigo-600 text-white font-semibold rounded-md hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:ring-offset-2">
                    Submit Comment
                </button>
            </form>
        </div>
    @else
        <p class="text-gray-600 mt-8">Please <a href="{{ route('login') }}" class="text-indigo-600 hover:underline">log in</a> to leave a comment.</p>
    @endauth
</div>
